# Description

Describe the bug clearly and explain why it matters.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened instead.

## Environment

- Extension version:
- VS Code version:
- OS:

## Logs, Screenshots, or Output

Include relevant status bar text, notification errors, output channel logs, or screenshots.

## Impact

Explain who is affected and whether this blocks development, causes confusion, or creates incorrect output.

## Technical Notes

Add any implementation clues, suspected files, or edge cases if you already investigated the issue.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] The bug is reproducible or the missing context is identified.
- [ ] The expected behavior is documented clearly enough to validate a fix.
- [ ] Any relevant commands, settings, or workflows are listed above.
